body_txt: Unusual capabilities manifest in the pilot episode. This lets the audience know right away that the series is about unusually enabled characters. It is very hard to pull off the introduction later on in a series without throwing your viewers for a loop, unless you are a master of foreshadowing. This is very common in superhero shows aimed at kids and teenagers in general. The plot of this introductory episode has a strong tendency to be one of the coping-with-new-powers or power-manifestation scenarios like How Do I Shot Web? , Die or Fly , or Falling into the Cockpit . Compare / contrast Second Hour Superpower , 11th-Hour Superpower , In Medias Res . If the power is immediately stripped away afterward, this is A Taste of Power . Sub-Trope of First-Episode Twist .
